desc: A wiry figure in dark, close-fitting clothes crouches in the shadows between chimneys. A crude dagger glints in one hand, and quick, calculating eyes sweep the roofline.

A lean, scarred man in dark leathers sits with his back to a chimney, one leg dangling over the roof edge. A well-kept iron dagger rests across his knee. He watches the town below with the proprietary air of someone who considers all of it his territory.
